failed_attempts.sql:
WITH potential_comments AS (
SELECT DISTINCT publication_id,
       p.id AS profile_id
FROM profile_relationship
JOIN profile AS r ON (origin_profile_id = 123456789)
OR (destination_profile_id = 123456789)
JOIN publication AS p ON (publication.id = profile_relationship.publication_id)
WHERE edge = 'follows'
), flagged_comments AS (
SELECT *,
       CASE
            WHEN annotation ILIKE '***%rac%s racial slur***%
                 OR annotation ILIKE '%racial slur*s*
               THEN TRUE 
            WHEN annotation ILIKE '***%sex*st gender***%
                 OR annotation ILIKE '*.*gender- based***%
               THEN TRUE
            WHEN annotation ILIKE '***%religuoue***%
                 OR annotation ILIKE '*r*ligioues*
               THEN TRUE 
        ELSE FALSE END AS is_flagged
FROM publication
JOIN potential_comments ON (publication.id = p.publication_id)
JOIN comment ON (comment.publication_id = publication.id AND comment.profile_id = r.id) ),
result_table AS (
SELECT
       profile_id,
       comment_id
FROM flagged_comments
WHERE is_flagged
ORDER BY ts_rank(description_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', '*** intolerance ***')) DESC
)
 SELECT * FROM result_table LIMIT 10;

WITH potential_comments AS (
SELECT DISTINCT publication_id,
       p.id AS profile_id
FROM profile_relationship
JOIN profile AS r ON (origin_profile_id = 123456789)
OR (destination_profile_id = 123456789)
JOIN publication AS p ON (publication.id = profile_relationship.publication_id)
WHERE origin_profile_id = 123456789 OR destination_profile_id = 123456789 AND edge = 'follows'
),
flagged_comments AS (
SELECT c.*, 
       CASE WHEN annotation ILIKE '***%rac%s racial slur***%' THEN TRUE
             WHEN annotation ILIKE '%racial slur*' THEN TRUE
             WHEN annotation ILIKE '***%sex*st gender***%' THEN TRUE
             WHEN annotation ILIKE '*.*gender- based***%' THEN TRUE
             WHEN annotation ILIKE '***%religuoue***%' THEN TRUE
             WHEN annotation ILIKE '*r*ligioues*' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_flagged
FROM publication,
     comment c JOIN potential_comments AS r ON (c/publication_id = p.id AND c.profile_id = r.id)
WHERE edge = 'follows'
),
comment_intolerance_table AS (
SELECT profile_id, 
       commented.profile_id AS comment_id
FROM flagged_comments, publication p JOIN  commented ON published_at > :date_limit ORDER BY coalesce(num_likes, 0) / num_comments DESC LIMIT 10;)
